name: gitmanager
description: Local-first, GitHub-like UI over multiple local git repositories with local PRs and automatic AI review.

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace packages/ui && npm run build --workspace packages/engine
scripts.desktop: npm run build && npm run desktop:rebuild && npm run start --workspace packages/desktop
scripts.desktop:dist: npm run build && npm run dist --workspace packages/desktop
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace packages/engine && npm run typecheck --workspace packages/ui && npm run typecheck --workspace packages/desktop
